message: Even looking around, I couldn't find Tim or Cindy.
I've reserved it just for you.
There are no customers in the bar. Looks like I'm the only one here tonight.
No way would that kind of phrase work even in a place like this, right?
The bare concrete walls feel quite cold. I don't know how many thousands of dollars were poured into the interior, but it's not my taste.
This place can't honestly be called beautiful.
He's looking at me with a distasteful expression. Does he have something to hide?
You've got white powder on the tip of your nose!
That's a lie. You should take it easy; it's going to lower the store's dignity.
I’ve never seen someone like that,
but his outrageous fashion is relatively subdued.
As usual, he's pretending to be busy by polishing glasses and wiping imaginary dirt off the counter.
Sorry, but Tim and Cindy aren't here today.
Isn't Tim still not back from his part-time job?
There should be auditions coming up soon, right? After that, he’ll be back for good—unless he passes, that is.
You must be pretty bored. You must be rich, right?
It’s not like I’m just sitting around doing nothing.
No, you look like you’re bored. That’s why you must be wealthy.
Poor people don’t have free time. They have to work hard to eat.
Your fashion sense is outdated. Not many people come here dressed like that.
Anyway, you've been coming around a lot lately.
It’s mostly just to annoy you.
Really, it's a pain. I wish they'd keep some bottles whenever they come.
It's fine when Tim and Ariana are around, but when they're not, I feel like a total information broker.
That's right. It might be okay to charge from now on.
You're nice for killing time, but the fact that it doesn't help sales is a bit of a flaw.
Right now, Tim's probably all about that audition instead of thinking about Ariana.
But you know, I think Tim actually doesn't want to take that audition.
Why's that? Wasn't becoming a musician his dream?
No, this time it feels like he’s only doing it because Ariana suggested it. That band isn't really his style.
I don’t really know what that band is like.
Is it different from Tim's vibe?
Do you think Tim would look good in a costume like that and wearing makeup like a woman?
Right? It’s just not his style after all. As a friend, I can only hope he doesn't pass.
If you cheer him on, won't he get mad?
I think she might be home, right?
By the way, I heard Tim didn't make it through the audition.
I'm glad he'll be back for his part-time job, but still, I kinda feel bad for him.
Ariana isn't a bad girl, but she sometimes tends to take charge, you know?
She doesn’t look that way, though. Especially when she's with Tim, she's so demure.
She's just putting on a facade. Or maybe she just acts nice in front of older guys?
Don't be fooled. She can be pretty selfish and has this attitude like she's a star or something.
Yeah, definitely acts like a star or something.
Right, it really feels like she’s flaunting her cuteness.
I'll admit she is cute. But based on that, it's just sad for Tim.
Speaking of which, Ariana hasn't been around lately.
Maybe she's avoiding coming here because that woman might show up.
Seems like Ariana and that woman don’t get along at all.
It's always so empty here, but are you still making a profit?
Haha, by the time you're in bed sleeping, it's actually packed. So don't worry about it.
No way, this place isn't open 24 hours, right?
Come on, stop joking. My body can't handle it.
The store gets most lively around 2 AM. You should come by then.
I'll pass. By that time, I'll be fast asleep.
Geez, it's true that old folks go to bed early. Oh, don't make that scary face, I'm just kidding.
How about you head home and get some sleep, buddy!
Tim probably wouldn't look good in heavy makeup, but maybe it would suit him.
Is the audition being orchestrated by Cindy? She probably wants Tim to do well, but what about Tim's feelings?
It seems Tim is taking time off until the audition.
But is it that boring here, or does he have another part-time job?
I wonder if Tim is at home? Not that I have any reason to meet him, but I'm curious.
Is he out looking for a job?
Does this guy at the counter not realize he’s Ariana = Cindy?
I thought Cindy was a sweet girl when she's with Tim.
Cindy has become selfish without realizing it.
